hem_core_version.description: The core version the input is written for. If there is a mismatch a warning will be printed

BuildingLength.description: The maximum horizontal distance (in metres) across the building footprint

BuildingWidth.description: The maximum horizontal distance (in metres) perpendicular to the building length

NumberOfTappedRooms.description: A tapped room is any room with a tapping point (e.g. sink, bath, or shower)

NumberOfUtilityRooms.description: A utility room is any that contains a sink or other feature or equipment that may reasonably be expected to produce significant quantities of water vapour

NumberOfBathrooms.description: A bathroom is any room that contains a bath or shower

NumberOfSanitaryAccommodations.description: Any space containing one or more flush toilets or urinals but not a bath or shower. Multiple cubicles counts as one space as long as there is free circulation of air throughout

NumberOfHabitableRooms.description: A habitable room is any that is not used solely as a kitchen, bathroom, utility, cellar or sanitary accommodation

daily_HW_usage.description: Daily hot water usage for the combi boiler system (unit: litre/day)
daily_HW_usage.title: Daily Hw Usage

rejected_energy_1.description: Rejected energy factor 1 for combi boiler efficiency calculations (unit: kWh)
rejected_energy_1.title: Rejected Energy 1

rejected_factor_3.description: Rejected energy factor 3 for combi boiler efficiency calculations (dimensionless)
rejected_factor_3.title: Rejected Factor 3

separate_DHW_tests.description: Type of separate domestic hot water test performed on the combi boiler (M&L, M&S, M_only, or No_additional_tests)

setpoint_temp.description: Temperature setpoint for the combi boiler hot water output (unit: ˚C)
setpoint_temp.title: Setpoint Temp

storage_loss_factor_1.description: Storage loss factor 1 for combi boiler efficiency calculations (dimensionless)
storage_loss_factor_1.title: Storage Loss Factor 1

storage_loss_factor_2.description: Storage loss factor 2 for combi boiler efficiency calculations (dimensionless)
storage_loss_factor_2.title: Storage Loss Factor 2

setpoint_temp.description: Temperature setpoint for the heat battery hot water output (unit: ˚C)
setpoint_temp.title: Setpoint Temp

heat_network_type.description: What type of heat network is present?

required: Emissions Factor kgCO2e/kWh including out-of-scope emissions

product_reference.description: A unique reference to a product held within the HEM database (PCDB)
product_reference.title: Reference to the product in the HEM database

boiler.description: Boiler used as backup for heat pump systems

EnergySupply.description: References a key (e.g., 'mains elec', 'mains gas') in $.EnergySupply
EnergySupply.title: Energysupply

EnergySupply_aux.description: References a key in $.EnergySupply for auxiliary electrical power
EnergySupply_aux.title: Energysupply Aux

boiler_location.description: Location of the boiler (internal or external to the building)
boiler_location.title: HeatSourceLocation

efficiency_full_load.description: Boiler net efficiency at full load (dimensionless, 0-1)
efficiency_full_load.title: Efficiency Full Load

efficiency_part_load.description: Boiler net efficiency at part load (dimensionless, 0-1.12). Net efficiencies may exceed 1 in test data.
efficiency_part_load.title: Efficiency Part Load

electricity_circ_pump.description: Electrical power consumption of circulation pump (unit: kW)
electricity_circ_pump.title: Electricity Circ Pump

electricity_full_load.description: Electrical power consumption at full load (unit: kW)
electricity_full_load.title: Electricity Full Load

electricity_part_load.description: Electrical power consumption at part load (unit: kW)
electricity_part_load.title: Electricity Part Load

electricity_standby.description: Electrical power consumption in standby mode (unit: kW)
electricity_standby.title: Electricity Standby

rated_power.description: Rated power output of the boiler (unit: kW)
rated_power.title: Rated Power

boiler.title: HeatPumpBoiler

temp_init.description: Initial temperature of the PCM heat battery at the start of simulation (unit: ˚C)
temp_init.title: Temp Init

dry_core_min_output.description: Lookup table for minimum output based on charge level

dry_core_max_output.description: Lookup table for maximum output based on charge level

state_of_charge_init.description: State of charge at initialisation of dry core heat storage (ratio)
state_of_charge_init.title: State Of Charge Init

system_a_efficiencies.description: Measured efficiencies for System A at the test flow rates

system_b_efficiencies.description: Measured efficiencies for System B (optional, uses system_b_efficiency_factor if not provided)

system_b_efficiency_factor.description: Reduction factor for System B efficiency (default 0.81)

system_b_utilisation_factor.description: Utilisation factor for System B (optional, defaults to system_a_utilisation_factor)

system_c_efficiencies.description: Measured efficiencies for System C (optional, uses system_c_efficiency_factor if not provided)

system_c_efficiency_factor.description: Reduction factor for System C efficiency (default 0.87)

system_c_utilisation_factor.description: Utilisation factor for System C (optional, defaults to system_a_utilisation_factor)

state_of_charge_init.description: State of charge at initialisation of dry core heat storage (ratio)
state_of_charge_init.title: State Of Charge Init

enum: Free heating surface (radiators, radiant panels etc.)
Floor heating, low temperature radiant tube heaters, luminous heaters, wood stoves
Wall heating, radiant ceiling panels, accumulation stoves
Ceiling heating, radiant ceiling electric heating

storeys_in_dwelling.description: Number of storeys within this dwelling

storey_of_dwelling.description: What storey of the main building is the flat on? For multi-story flats, enter the lowest storey the unit occupies

SFP_in_use_factor.description: Adjustment factor to be applied to SFP to account for e.g. type of ducting. Typical range 1 - 2.5
SFP_in_use_factor.title: Sfp In Use Factor

mid_height_air_flow_path.description: Mid height of air flow path relative to ventilation zone (unit: m)

orientation360.description: The orientation angle of the inclined surface, expressed as the geographical azimuth angle of the horizontal projection of the inclined surface normal, 0 to 360 (unit: ˚)

pitch.description: Tilt angle of the surface from horizontal, between 0 and 180, where 0 means the external surface is facing up, 90 means the external surface is vertical and 180 means the external surface is facing down (unit: ˚)

mid_height_air_flow_path.description: Mid height of air flow path relative to ventilation zone (unit: m)

orientation360.description: The orientation angle of the inclined surface, expressed as the geographical azimuth angle of the horizontal projection of the inclined surface normal, 0 to 360 (unit: ˚)

pitch.description: Tilt angle of the surface from horizontal, between 0 and 180, where 0 means the external surface is facing up, 90 means the external surface is vertical and 180 means the external surface is facing down (unit: ˚)

mid_height_air_flow_path.description: Mid height of air flow path relative to ventilation zone (unit: m)

orientation360.description: The orientation angle of the inclined surface, expressed as the geographical azimuth angle of the horizontal projection of the inclined surface normal, 0 to 360 (unit: ˚)

pitch.description: Tilt angle of the surface from horizontal, between 0 and 180, where 0 means the external surface is facing up, 90 means the external surface is vertical and 180 means the external surface is facing down (unit: ˚)

mid_height_air_flow_path.description: Mid height of air flow path relative to ventilation zone (unit: m)

orientation360.description: The orientation angle of the inclined surface, expressed as the geographical azimuth angle of the horizontal projection of the inclined surface normal, 0 to 360 (unit: ˚)

pitch.description: Tilt angle of the surface from horizontal, between 0 and 180, where 0 means the external surface is facing up, 90 means the external surface is vertical and 180 means the external surface is facing down (unit: ˚)

SFP.description: Specific fan power, assumed inclusive of any in use factors unless SFP_in_use_factor also provided (unit: W/l/s)

orientation360.description: Degrees from north. Recommend choosing 180 in cases of flat elements i.e. where pitch = 0 or 180

enum: I: Mass concentrated at internal side
E: Mass concentrated at external side
IE: Mass divided over internal and external side
MassDistributionClass.title: MassDistributionClass

cost_schedule_boiler.description: Cost data for the fuel used by the hybrid's boiler (can be any units, typically p/kWh)

cost_schedule_hp.description: Cost data for the fuel used by the hybrid's heat pump (can be any units, typically p/kWh)

cost_schedule_start_day.description: Day on which the cost data series begins
cost_schedule_start_day.title: Cost Schedule Start Day

cost_schedule_time_series_step.description: Time step of the cost data series
cost_schedule_time_series_step.title: Cost Schedule Time Series Step

ScheduleForDouble.description:
A dictionary of schedule entries where:
- Keys are user-defined names (e.g., "main", "week", "weekday", "weekend")
- Values are lists of ScheduleEntryForDouble
- The "main" entry is required
ScheduleForDouble.title: ScheduleForDouble

ScheduleEntryForDouble.description:
A schedule entry that can be a direct value, repeating pattern, or reference.

Examples:
    # Direct float value (temperature setpoint)
    21.5

    # Repeating pattern (21.5°C for 8 hours, 18°C for 16 hours)
    {"repeat": 24, "value": 21.5}

    # Reference to another schedule
    "weekday_temp_schedule"

    # Complex repeating pattern with reference
    {"repeat": 7, "value": "daily_temp_pattern"}

    # Power level schedule
    2.5  # 2.5 kW constant power
ScheduleEntryForDouble.title: ScheduleEntryForDouble

repeat.description: Number of times to repeat the value
repeat.title: Repeat

value.description: Value to repeat or schedule reference

ScheduleRepeaterForDouble.title: ScheduleRepeaterForDouble
